name: Christian Credit Counseling - Debt Redemption
description_short: Christian Credit Counseling - Debt Redemption is a credit repair provider based in San Antonio, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Christian Credit Counseling - Debt Redemption is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Antonio, Texas. The company serves consumers in the San Antonio area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a financial institution, financial planner, loan agency, Christian Credit Counseling - Debt Redemption provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Antonio, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Christian Credit Counseling - Debt Redemption operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Antonio, Texas area who are considering Christian Credit Counseling - Debt Redemption should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
